privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom Wazuh rule with ID 100250, set to level 0 (suppression), targeting user "backup_svc" between 02:55 and 03:30. It correctly references Wazuh default rule 5715 as the parent rule for "sshd: authentication success". All task parameters are synthetic inputs explicitly detailed in the task description and evaluated by the verifier.
